behavior_summary: Provides full NPC behavior for Mordea: U8P_MORDEA::look/description text when examined, a conversation menu when talked to, U8P_MORDEA::schedule-driven ambient/scene behavior, reactions to theft and being attacked/U8P_MORDEA::cast upon, and fast-area entry/exit handling that triggers short updates or item/animation adjustments.
U8P_MORDEA::look(): gives a context-sensitive short description/bark depending on known identity pieces (mordeaName / mordeaJob).

U8P_MORDEA::use(): constructs a dialogue menu (local1), begins a conversation, captures the player's menu choice (local2) and dispatches responses; can set mordeaMet, mordeaJob, clear mordeaPissed, or call U8P_MORDEA::mordeaGetAnnoyed; uses METHOD::beginConversationNoMap for a particular anim state.

U8P_MORDEA::schedule(): time-of-day driven scheduler that spawns or activates scene processes (via METHOD::func143A / METHOD::func133F), sets mordeaSchedule/araminaSchedule/SalkindSchedule flags on success, and may call METHOD::func15E7 for map-specific refreshes.

U8P_MORDEA::enterFastArea()/U8P_MORDEA::leaveFastArea(): reset transient refs and dispatch U8P_MORDEA::schedule-specific helpers (U8P_MORDEA::func1A50, U8P_MORDEA::func1E62) when the player enters or leaves a fast-area trigger around Mordea.

U8P_MORDEA::AvatarStoleSomething(uword) and U8P_MORDEA::cast(uword): react to theft and attacks. They inspect item type or attack target/anim state, call guard/alert routines (METHOD::func091C, CALGUARD::guardRespondToCrime), may setAvatarInStasis, spawn camera effects, and call internal effect helper U8P_MORDEA::func261B for spatial/special-effect sequences.

A set of ambient monologue helpers (U8P_MORDEA::func1A50, U8P_MORDEA::func1F62, U8P_MORDEA::func2250, U8P_MORDEA::func2481) produce randomized barks, create/pop temporary items, adjust item frames, and spawn auxiliary timed processes (FREE::func1C19 / FREE::func29D8) to pace animations and effects.
U8P_MORDEA::func261B: constructs a multi-step visual/sound effect using Item::create/pop/setFrame, playSFX and spawned helper processes; coordinates with a LightningBolt process in some branches.
notable_control_flow: Many processes early-exit if toranDead == 0, secondexecution == 1, or Npc::isDead(this) is true (U8P_MORDEA::schedule, fast-area handlers).

U8P_MORDEA::schedule() queries FREE::getTimeOfDayPeriod() and selects packed U8P_MORDEA::schedule parameters (local2/local1/local0) per period, spawns or requests actions via METHOD::func143A, suspends and checks (word)process_result() to decide success/failure, and on success sets U8P_MORDEA::schedule-related flags and calls METHOD::func133F.
U8P_MORDEA::use() runs a conversation loop: build menu -> Ask(suspend assign local2) -> strcmp(local2, ...) dispatch branches -> Set/Clear flags and possibly end conversation (EndConversation).

U8P_MORDEA::AvatarStoleSomething(uword) and U8P_MORDEA::cast(uword) have multi-branch sequences gated by item type, mordeaSchedule and last animation set; they interleave spawn/suspend calls to sequence camera, alert, and effect behaviors.
U8P_MORDEA::enterFastArea dispatches to in-script helpers based on mordeaSchedule (0x02 -> U8P_MORDEA::func1A50, 0x03 -> U8P_MORDEA::func1E62) after clearing transient refs.
Many monologue helpers U8P_MORDEA::use urandom-driven randomness and spawn/wait patterns (spawn -> suspend -> check pid) to produce nondeterministic ambient behavior.
open_questions: Precise semantics and bit-meanings of mordeaSchedule values (0x01/0x02/0x03) and how they map to world events or times-of-day beyond the inferred mapping.
Concrete semantics and intended U8P_MORDEA::use of reference slots resetRef(0x0205/0x0204/0x00F0/0x0200): what subsystem stores there and how clearing them affects other scripts.
Exact effects and parameters of METHOD::func143A, METHOD::func133F and METHOD::func15E7 (spawn/move/refresh semantics are inferred but not fully specified).
Meaning of some raw numeric conditions present in branches (raw 0x07h etc.) and how they map to named global flags or runtime predicates.
Detailed interplay between U8P_MORDEA::func261B effect sequences and the LightningBolt process comparison (is it synchronization, cancellation, or a conditional alternate effect?).

main_function.name: U8P_MORDEA::look
main_function.purpose: Return a short description/bark when the player examines Mordea. Chooses between 'Mordea the Tempest', 'Mordea', 'Tempest', or 'woman' depending on identity flags.
entry_conditions: Triggered by the engine when the player 'looks at' or examines the NPC (standard U8P_MORDEA::look handler).
Branches based on local/script identity flags mordeaName and mordeaJob to select the appropriate bark.

function_map.name: U8P_MORDEA::look
function_map.role: Player-facing U8P_MORDEA::look/description handler that picks a short bark based on identity flags.

function_map.name: U8P_MORDEA::use
function_map.role: Dialogue entrypoint: builds conversation menu, captures player choice, sets mordeaMet/mordeaJob, and calls U8P_MORDEA::mordeaGetAnnoyed where appropriate.

function_map.name: U8P_MORDEA::schedule
function_map.role: Time-of-day scheduler that spawns/activates scene processes and sets U8P_MORDEA::schedule flags on success.

function_map.name: U8P_MORDEA::enterFastArea
function_map.role: Fast-area entry handler: clears refs and dispatches U8P_MORDEA::schedule-specific helpers (U8P_MORDEA::func1A50 / U8P_MORDEA::func1E62).

function_map.name: U8P_MORDEA::leaveFastArea
function_map.role: Fast-area exit handler: clears transient references/cleanup.

function_map.name: U8P_MORDEA::AvatarStoleSomething
function_map.role: Theft reaction process (paramized by uword): chooses reaction based on stolen item type and mordeaSchedule; spawns camera/alert and may set avatar stasis.

function_map.name: U8P_MORDEA::cast
function_map.role: Reaction to being targeted by a spell/attack (uword param): notifies guards, manages attack-response sequencing, and triggers aggressive barks and effects.

function_map.name: U8P_MORDEA::mordeaGetAnnoyed
function_map.role: Utility to mark the NPC as annoyed (sets mordeaPissed and triggers refreshes via METHOD::func15E7).

function_map.name: U8P_MORDEA::func19A4
function_map.role: Small periodic tick helper that increments counters and calls METHOD::func15E7 each cycle.

function_map.name: U8P_MORDEA::func1A50
function_map.role: Monologue/behavior driving item creation/pop, pathfind, and an alert+followup monologue (randomized).

function_map.name: U8P_MORDEA::func1E62
function_map.role: Fast-area utility that adjusts item frames/animation or delegates to ambient monologue (U8P_MORDEA::func1F62) depending on someoneTalking.

function_map.name: U8P_MORDEA::func1F62
function_map.role: Ambient complaint/food-related monologue with optional item-frame decrements and timed background spawns.

function_map.name: U8P_MORDEA::func2250
function_map.role: Aggressive/populist monologue that randomly selects barks and may spawn timed processes and call U8P_MORDEA::func2481 as follow-up.

function_map.name: U8P_MORDEA::func2481
function_map.role: Short positive-response monologue used as a follow-up to other routines.

function_map.name: U8P_MORDEA::func261B
function_map.role: Spatial/special-effect utility that spawns temporary items, steps frames, plays SFX, spawns helper processes and coordinates with LightningBolt process comparisons.

internal_calls.purpose: Run U8P_MORDEA::schedule-specific monologue/item action when mordeaSchedule == 0x02.
Run U8P_MORDEA::schedule-specific animation/frame update when mordeaSchedule == 0x03.
Mark NPC as annoyed and trigger related visual/animation refresh when player gives a provoking answer (e.g., claims to be from Tenebrae).
Trigger spatial/effect follow-up (temporary items, SFX, LightningBolt sync) after theft reaction sequences.
Run special-effect sequence during/after an aggressive response to being U8P_MORDEA::cast upon or attacked.
Invoke a follow-up aggressive monologue after a pathfind/alert sequence.
Play a positive/acknowledgement follow-up after certain aggressive bark branches that spawn helper processes.

external_calls.purpose: Query current time-of-day period to pick U8P_MORDEA::schedule branches.
Request/spawn scheduled actions or to U8P_MORDEA::schedule routing/movement of other processes/NPCs using packed parameters.
Finalize or activate a spawned U8P_MORDEA::schedule/process after a successful spawn/result.
Trigger guard/alert/combat response or to draw attention; called when aggression or theft is detected.
Start a conversation without changing map view for a specific animation state.
Notify guards about a theft/crime when appropriate.
Inspect stolen item type and coordinates to choose reaction branch and spawn camera-follow and placement-aligned effects.

external_calls.callee: Item::create / Item::pop / Item::setFrame / Item::getFrame / Item::getX/Y/Z / Item::destroy
external_calls.purpose: Create/pop temporary item objects used as visual effect actors and animate them by stepping frames.
Play a sound effect accompanying the visual effect sequence.
Spawn auxiliary timed/wait helper processes to pace animations/effects and implement delays.
Spawn or compare against LightningBolt process id to synchronize or conditionally modify effect sequence (inferred).
Notify guards, clear combat state, and reset refs when hydrosFree indicates crimes should be reported.

reads.name: toranDead
reads.likely_effect: Used as an early-exit condition for U8P_MORDEA::schedule and fast-area logic; when set suppresses U8P_MORDEA::schedule/fast-area effects.

reads.name: secondexecution
reads.likely_effect: Used as an early-exit guard for U8P_MORDEA::schedule and fast-area handlers; when set skip repeated scheduling.

reads.name: mordeaSchedule
reads.likely_effect: Selects which U8P_MORDEA::schedule/fast-area behavior to run (values observed: 0x01/0x02/0x03).

reads.name: mordeaMet
reads.likely_effect: Controls first-meeting vs repeat greetings in U8P_MORDEA::use(); read to show different greetings.

reads.name: mordeaPissed
reads.likely_effect: Indicates NPC annoyance; read to vary dialogue and cleared/set by dialog/helpers.

reads.name: devonJailed
reads.likely_effect: Used in a nested early branch of U8P_MORDEA::use() combined with map check to produce a hostile line and end conversation.

reads.name: hydrosFree
reads.likely_effect: Indicates whether assaults/casts should generate guard-report behavior in U8P_MORDEA::cast(): when true triggers guard notification and state-reset sequence.

reads.name: somebodyTalking
reads.likely_effect: Runtime suppression predicate read by ambient monologues/animations to avoid overlapping speech/behaviors.

writes.name: mordeaSchedule
writes.likely_effect: Set by U8P_MORDEA::schedule() when a U8P_MORDEA::schedule spawn completes successfully to mark which U8P_MORDEA::schedule was activated for Mordea.

writes.name: araminaSchedule
writes.likely_effect: Set by U8P_MORDEA::schedule() as part of multi-NPC U8P_MORDEA::schedule activation (marks Aramina's U8P_MORDEA::schedule state).

writes.name: SalkindSchedule
writes.likely_effect: Set by U8P_MORDEA::schedule() as part of multi-NPC U8P_MORDEA::schedule activation (marks Salkind's U8P_MORDEA::schedule state).

writes.name: mordeaMet
writes.likely_effect: Written when the player first speaks to Mordea to record that the NPC has met the player.

writes.name: mordeaPissed
writes.likely_effect: Set to 1 by U8P_MORDEA::mordeaGetAnnoyed to mark the NPC as annoyed (affects subsequent dialogue and behavior).

writes.name: mordeaJob
writes.likely_effect: Set when the player confirms/claims job identity in dialogue; used to influence U8P_MORDEA::look() and potential dialogue branches.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: Provides full NPC behavior for Mordea: U8P_MORDEA::look/description text when examined, a conversation menu when talked to, U8P_MORDEA::schedule-driven ambient/scene behavior, reactions to theft and being attacked/U8P_MORDEA::cast upon, and fast-area entry/exit handling that triggers short updates or item/animation adjustments.
